''' name: CI - Quality Water DLT v3

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, v3-work ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      # --- Checkout du repo ---
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      # --- Installation Python ---
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.10"

      # --- Installation des dépendances ---
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          pip install flake8 pytest pyyaml

      # --- Validation du YAML ---
      - name: Validate YAML config
        run: |
          python - <<EOF
          import yaml
          import sys
          try:
              yaml.safe_load(open("config/config.yaml"))
              print("YAML OK ✔️")
          except Exception as e:
              print("❌ YAML ERROR:", e)
              sys.exit(1)
          EOF

      # --- Lint Python ---
      - name: Run flake8 linting
        run: |
          flake8 utils notebooks || true

      # --- Tests unitaires ---
      - name: Run pytest
        run: |
          pytest -q || true

      # --- Vérification que les notebooks se chargent ---
      - name: Validate notebooks import
        run: |
          python - <<EOF
          import os, sys
          import importlib.util

          base = "notebooks"
          for root, dirs, files in os.walk(base):
              for f in files:
                  if f.endswith(".py"):
                      path = os.path.join(root, f)
                      print(f"Checking {path}")
                      spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("nb", path)
                      try:
                          module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
                          spec.loader.exec_module(module)
                      except Exception as e:
                          print("❌ Notebook import error:", e)
                          sys.exit(1)
          print("Notebooks OK ✔️")
          EOF
'''
